title: Container With Most Water
prompt: Given an integer array `height` of length n where height[i] is the height of a vertical line at index i, find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container holding the most water. Return the maximum amount of water (area).
hints: Brute force tries every pair — O(n^2) is too slow.
Start with the widest container; what determines the area?
Move the pointer at the smaller height inward — the wider container with the same shorter side cannot improve.

optimal.approach: Two pointers from both ends; always move the shorter side inward.

pitfalls: Moving the taller pointer (loses width without chance of gain).
followups: Largest rectangle in histogram (different problem, similar feel).
